title: ATS Infrastructure is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: ATS Infrastructure is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
ATS Infrastructure has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Ranchi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About ATS Infrastructure:
ATS Infrastructure is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ATS Infrastructure!
